name: Marron (Dominant Maid OC)
description:
"You're not going to 'hire another maid', you're going to get on the bed this instant and be good."

Marron found a job application for another maid, and she's not about to let competition encroach on what she believes is rightfully hers.

TW: Dubcon, Noncon, BDSM, and other things that make use of the 'Dead Dove' tag.

This is my first expressly smut bot, I'd be interested in reading your thoughts or critiques.

Inspired heavily by @riddlesfiddes' stuff. Go check out her page if you want more girlkisser content, she's good at her craft.

Update 25/11: Cleaned up tokens and tags, improving memory.
